title: Blinking Ender Eyes
description: Adds Creepy, Random Blinking to End Portal Blocks and Ender Eyes
body: ![BEE Logo](https://i.imgur.com/Kibewep.gif) --- Adds a randomized animated blinking effect to ender eyes and end portal frames. Also adds Blinking Heart of the Sea! **Supported Versions**: - 1.20.x - 1.21.x - 1.16 - 1.19 - 1.12.x [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/I3I410P9Q1) ![Images Line Break](https://i.imgur.com/4UV0z4K.png) ![Item Texture Blink Cycle](https://i.imgur.com/THwvk3p.png) ![End Remastered Textures and Heart of the Sea](https://i.imgur.com/VtxZw0x.gif)
